regime_name: Q4 2018 Federal Reserve Rate Hike Cycle
catalyst: Fed Chair Powell: 'interest rates are a long way from neutral' — October 2018

archival_flow_observations.systematic_quant: Massive forced deleveraging triggered by VaR breaches. Momentum books hit hardest — crowded long positions in tech liquidated indiscriminately within 48-72 hours of initial catalyst.
archival_flow_observations.pod_shops: PM books cut by center risk as drawdown limits hit across the platform. Feedback loop with systematic quant created self-reinforcing selling cascade in December.
archival_flow_observations.global_macro: Aggressively shorted front-end rates via Eurodollar futures. Several large macro funds reported their best quarter in 5 years.
archival_flow_observations.fundamental_ls: Absorbed initial drawdown (-15-20%) without reducing positions. Largest deployment month was December 2018 — bought into the lows. Outperformed significantly in H1 2019.
archival_flow_observations.activist: Could not liquidate large block positions. Purchased protective VIX calls. Engaged in behind-the-scenes negotiations for accelerated buybacks at favorable prices.

analog_uses: Primary stress test scenario for War Room simulation. Represents canonical 'mechanical seller vs. fundamental absorber' dynamic.
